reference: I am forty-five years old. Five years ago, I had an operation on my spinal cord for a slipped disc that was touching the nerves, which caused pain in my left leg. Now, after five years, I am experiencing severe back pain. Doctors advised me to undergo traction since I do not have any old leg pain. Please advise.
text: I am 45 years old. Five years ago I had an operation on my spinal cord for a split disc that was touching the nerves, which caused pain in my left leg. Now, after 5 years, I am experiencing severe back pain. Doctors advised me to undergo traction since I do not have any old leg pain. Please advise.
